commit_title: sync: add Claude Code 2.1.83 changelog and clarify Ctrl+M keybinding note
commit_body:
- Add the 2.1.83 changelog entry with new settings and hook events.
- Clarify in the keybindings reference that Ctrl+M cannot be rebound.
- No new documentation pages were added in this snapshot.
release_notes_markdown:
## Summary
This snapshot adds the Claude Code 2.1.83 changelog entry.

## Added Docs
None.

## Updated Docs
- `docs/en/changelog.md`: added the 2.1.83 release entry.
- `docs/en/keybindings.md`: clarified Ctrl+M behavior.

## Notable Impact
Users can now see the full 2.1.83 release notes in the archive.
key_changes: Added the Claude Code 2.1.83 changelog entry
Documented new settings and hook events
Clarified that Ctrl+M cannot be rebound
